meta.title: A closer examination of a study on verbal and non-verbal messages
meta.sourceDoc: 60. P3 - A closer examination of a study on verbal and non-verbal messages 语言表达研究.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: A closer examination of a study on verbal and non-verbal messages 语言表达研究

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：D
PDF 定位：DescriptionoftheStudy第1段首句"...astudyofverbal andnon-verbalmessagesincommunication"→研究比较 的是语言与非语言信息在交流中的作用/影响
PDF 解析："effects"最能概括两种信息对交流造成的影响；不是 ""characteristics/purposes"，文本未讨论特征或目的

题目 28
答案：G
PDF 定位：同段2-3句...subjectshadtoguesstheemotions inthe recorded voice and the photos"
PDF 解析：两个实验都要求受试者判断对方所表达的情感(feelings)

题目 29
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：同段2-3句..photosoffemalefacesexpressingthesame three emotions....

题目 30
答案：E
PDF 定位：第3段"subjects listened to nine recorded words ...three had positive meanings... three neutral... three negative"
PDF 解析：第二次实验比较"语调"与词义对情感判断的影响

题目 27
答案：D
PDF 定位：DescriptionoftheStudy第1段首句"...astudyofverbal andnon-verbalmessagesincommunication"→研究比较 的是语言与非语言信息在交流中的作用/影响

答案：A

PDF 定位：第3段"subjects listened to nine recorded words ...three had positive meanings... three neutral... three negative"

questionSections.text:
题目 31
答案：YES
PDF 定位：MethodologicalIssues第1句"theentire study involved only 62 subjects"
PDF 解析：作者明确把样本量过小列为局限

题目 32
答案：NO
PDF 定位：同段"..theirages andacademic qualifications seem remarkably uniform. Thus, the findings may simply be a product of the nature of the sample."
PDF 解析：受试者背景相似被视为劣势而非优势

题目 33
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位：文中无任何关于两实验进行顺序应更换的评论
PDF 解析：无信息支持或反驳

题目 34
答案：NO
PDF 定位：同段后半"The researchers intentionallyuseda'neutral' word so naturally the subjects found little meaning there. Clearly, such a methodology lacks validity."
PDF 解析：选择中性词被批评为削弱有效性，而非"有帮助"

题目 35
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位：文章未讨论使用多种语言会否提高有效性
PDF 解析：信息缺失

questionSections.text:
题目 36
答案：A
PDF 定位：the Mehrabian study is its numerical precision... numbers seemtopossess exactness."
PDF 解析："Numericalprecision"使结论"更吸引人"

题目 37
答案：B
PDF 定位：同段后半"continuedreferencesto thisresearch... encouraging people to believe in the overwhelming importance of the non-verbal message... Yet we know ... Words do matter."
PDF 解析：流行度导致人们低估语言的重要性

题目 38
答案：D
PDF 定位：引用Bradley(1991)"If we could communicate93%... it would be wasteful to spend time learning a language."
PDF 解析：反语强调：我们既然努力学语言，说明语言必然重要

题目 39
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：Mehrabian 引语 ...all my findings dealt with communications of feelings and attitudes...anytime we communicate abstract relationships... 1oo % ...is verbal.

题目 40
答案：C
PDF 定位："To be fair, many textbook writers attempt to be faithful.. Others try to play down... Nonetheless, other textbook authors simply use the numbers...
PDF 解析：该段列举不同教材作者对Mehrabian研究的多种解释与用法
